AppPlanner: plan: (landofile: LandofileShape, providerCapabilities: ProviderCapabilities) => Effect.Effect<AppPlan, LandofileValidationError | CapabilityError | NotImplementedError | PublicationUnsupportedError>
BuildOrchestrator: build: (plan: AppPlan) => Effect.Effect<AppPlan, EventError | NoProviderInstalledError | ProviderConfigError | ProviderError | ProviderUnavailableError>
CacheService: read: <A, I>(key: string, schema?: Schema.Schema<A, I>) => Effect.Effect<A | null, CacheError>
write: <A>(key: string, value: A, ttlMs?: number) => Effect.Effect<void, CacheError>
writeAtomic: (path: string, content: string | Uint8Array) => Effect.Effect<void, CacheError>
ConfigService: get: <K extends keyof GlobalConfig>(key: K) => Effect.Effect<GlobalConfig[K], ConfigError>
EventService: subscribe: <Name extends string>(name: Name) => Stream.Stream<EventFor<Name>, EventError>
waitFor: <Name extends string>(name: Name, options?: EventWaitOptions<Name>) => Effect.Effect<EventFor<Name>, EventError>
waitForAny: <const Names extends readonly string[]>(specs: EventWaitSpecs<Names>, options?: EventWaitAnyOptions) => Effect.Effect<EventFor<Names[number] & string>, EventError>
query: <Name extends string>(name: Name, filter?: (event: EventFor<Name>) => boolean) => Effect.Effect<ReadonlyArray<EventFor<Name>>, never>
FileSystem: write: (path: string, content: string | Uint8Array) => Effect.Effect<void, FileSystemError>
writeAtomic: (path: string, content: string | Uint8Array) => Effect.Effect<void, FileSystemError>
writeFile: (path: string, content: string) => Effect.Effect<void, FileSystemError>
LandofileService: discover: Effect.Effect<LandofileShape, LandofileNotFoundError | LandofileParseError | LandofileValidationError | LandofileSandboxError | LandofileTimeoutError | LandofileFormConflictError | LandofileIncludeError | LandofileLockMismatchError | NotImplementedError>
Logger: debug: (message: string, data?: Readonly<Record<string, unknown>>) => Effect.Effect<void, EventError>
error: (message: string, data?: Readonly<Record<string, unknown>>) => Effect.Effect<void, EventError>
info: (message: string, data?: Readonly<Record<string, unknown>>) => Effect.Effect<void, EventError>
warn: (message: string, data?: Readonly<Record<string, unknown>>) => Effect.Effect<void, EventError>
PluginRegistry: loadServiceType: (id: string) => Effect.Effect<ServiceType, PluginLoadError | PluginManifestError | ServiceTypeCollisionError>
RuntimeProvider: apply: (plan: AppPlan, options: ApplyOptions) => Effect.Effect<ApplyResult, ProviderError, Scope.Scope>
copyFromService: (target: ExecTarget, spec: ServiceCopyOutSpec) => Stream.Stream<Uint8Array, ProviderError, Scope.Scope>
copyToService: (target: ExecTarget, spec: ServiceCopyInSpec) => Effect.Effect<void, ProviderError, Scope.Scope>
destroy: (target: AppSelector, options: DestroyOptions) => Effect.Effect<void, ProviderError>
exec: (target: ExecTarget, command: CommandSpec) => Effect.Effect<ExecResult, ProviderError>
execStream: (target: ExecTarget, command: CommandSpec) => Stream.Stream<ExecChunk, ProviderError, Scope.Scope>
importArtifact: (data: Stream.Stream<Uint8Array, ProviderError>) => Effect.Effect<ArtifactRef, ProviderError, Scope.Scope>
logs: (target: LogTarget, options: LogOptions) => Stream.Stream<LogChunk, ProviderError>
setup: (plan: ProviderSetupPlan, options: ProviderSetupOptions) => Effect.Effect<void, ProviderError, Scope.Scope>
RuntimeProviderRegistry: select: (plan?: AppPlan) => Effect.Effect<RuntimeProviderShape, ProviderUnavailableError | ProviderConfigError | NoProviderInstalledError>
ShellRunner: exec: (command: string, options?: ShellCommandOptions) => Effect.Effect<ProcessResult, ShellExecError>
run: (command: string, options?: ShellCommandOptions) => Effect.Effect<ProcessResult, ShellExecError>
runScript: (path: string, options?: ShellCommandOptions) => Effect.Effect<ProcessResult, ShellExecError>
